report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocols Guide 2026 and DAO Governance & On-Chain Voting Guide 2026 — filling major content gaps in infrastructure and governance education.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Identified cross-chain interoperability and DAO governance as two significant content gaps — no dedicated guides despite existing bridge and governance-tracker tool pages

Cross-chain interop: LayerZero dominates with 75% of bridge volume (1.2M msgs/day, $293M daily transfers, 165+ chains). CCIP surged 1,972% to $7.77B in 2025, securing $33.6B with zero exploits. Wormhole remains cost leader but carries security baggage ($325M hack, $1.4B freeze). Axelar rising with gasless bridging and institutional privacy features

DAO governance: $13.6B in total DAO liquidity across 50,845+ organizations, but only 28% of 11.8M token holders actively vote. Top 10% of holders control 76.2% of voting power. Major 2026 trend: DAOs paradoxically centralizing (Arbitrum OpCo, Jupiter 6-month pause, Scroll CEO-led structure)
Emerging standards: ERC-7683 for cross-chain intents, IEEE 3221.01-2025 for security evaluation. Delphi Digital predicts 60% of interop protocols will vanish by 2027
Governance innovations: Ownership coins ($1B market cap predicted), metagovernance (DAO-to-DAO voting), MultiGov hub-and-spoke architecture, ZK-proof private voting

sections.title: Content Created
items: Cross-Chain Interoperability Guide 2026 (~2,900 words, 14 min read) — covers why interop matters, 3 messaging security models, Big Four protocol deep dives (LayerZero, CCIP, Wormhole, Axelar), standards & consolidation, security tiers, and use-case-based protocol selection guide

DAO Governance & On-Chain Voting Guide 2026 (~2,700 words, 12 min read) — covers what DAOs are, 4-stage governance flow, on-chain vs off-chain voting comparison, delegate voting mechanics, top DAOs by treasury, centralization problem analysis, governance tools (Snapshot, Tally, Boardroom, SafeSnap, Agora), and emerging innovations
Both guides include 4 FAQs each targeting high-search-volume questions, 4+ internal links to existing degen0x pages, and related articles sections

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Cross-Chain Interop: title 'Cross-Chain Interoperability Guide 2026: LayerZero, CCIP, Wormhole | degen0x' (69 chars), target keywords: cross-chain interoperability, LayerZero, Chainlink CCIP, Wormhole, cross-chain messaging

DAO Governance: title 'DAO Governance & On-Chain Voting Guide 2026: How DAOs Work | degen0x' (68 chars), target keywords: DAO governance, on-chain voting, delegate voting, governance tokens, crypto DAOs
Both pages use Article JSON-LD schema via ArticleStructuredData component, FAQPage schema via FAQStructuredData component, and BreadcrumbList schema via Breadcrumb component
Both pages include OpenGraph article metadata with publishedTime, Twitter summary_large_image cards, and dynamic OG images via /api/og endpoint
